'''鈭歨-zh-dh-th''' ('''kahazhdhethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isograft|isograft]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isograft|isograft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-zh-dh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kahazhdhethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazhdhethoko|thihazhdhethoko]] || [[word:jihazhdhethoko|jihazhdhethoko]] || [[word:shihazhdhethoko|shihazhdhethoko]] || [[word:kihazhdhethoko|kihazhdhethoko]]
